captured.label: Wallet welcome / onboarding (desktop)
captured.whatItShows: Welcome to the Nimiq Wallet headline, subhead '100% free and self-custodial web wallet for NIM, BTC and USDC', white choice card with green Create Account tile, Login, Connect Ledger. Note: wallet.nimiq.com top-level redirects to hub.nimiq.com/onboard when no account exists — no popup involved.

captured.label: Wallet welcome / onboarding (mobile)
captured.whatItShows: Mobile layout: choice card becomes a stacked bottom sheet; Create Account tile full-width green gradient with circular plus icon on the right.

captured.label: Element: onboarding choice card
captured.whatItShows: The full white rounded card containing all three onboarding choices with divider before Ledger option.

captured.label: Element: Create Account button
captured.whatItShows: Green gradient signup tile (button.choice.signup) with white circle plus icon, 'Create Account' title, 'Set a password. Get the Login file. Done.' subtitle.

captured.label: Element: Login button
captured.whatItShows: Login choice tile with gray circular arrow icon.

captured.label: Element: Connect Ledger button
captured.whatItShows: Connect Ledger choice tile with line-art Ledger device illustration.

captured.label: Element: header Nimiq logo
captured.whatItShows: Top-left header lockup: gold hexagon + NIMIQ wordmark in dark navy.

captured.label: Signup step 1: Login File intro
captured.whatItShows: Keyguard create-account intro card: 'Your key to logging in', blue 'Set password' pill button, 'What is a Login File?' link, 'Back to Wallet' global close. Create Account hands off from hub to keyguard.nimiq.com (full-page redirect, not a popup).

captured.label: Signup overlay: What is a Login File?
captured.whatItShows: Explainer page: image-file-plus-password concept, 'Nimiq does not store your data', 'Got it' button.

captured.label: Signup step 2: Create a password
captured.whatItShows: 'Create a password' card with Login File line illustration, warning about no Forgot-password, large blue-gradient password input panel with eye toggle and 8 dot placeholders.

captured.label: Element: password input panel
captured.whatItShows: The distinctive blue-gradient nq-input password field with 'Enter 8 characters or more' placeholder.

captured.label: Signup step 2b: password filled state
captured.whatItShows: Password entered (masked dots) with inverse 'Repeat password' submit button active inside the blue panel.

captured.label: Signup step 3: Repeat your password
captured.whatItShows: 'Repeat your password' confirmation state with 'Create account' submit button.

captured.label: Signup step 4: Download your Login File
captured.whatItShows: Final reachable step before the download gate: generated orange Login File card ('Orange Account', key icon, QR code, date sidebar, 'Keep safe and confidential') with blue DOWNLOAD pill and disabled continue chevron. Flow stopped here per no-download rule.

captured.label: Element: Login File card graphic
captured.whatItShows: Close crop of the orange-gradient Login File card — strongest single branding asset captured (hexagon logo, topo-line texture, QR, account color name).

captured.label: Element: Download button
captured.whatItShows: Light-blue nq-button pill with download icon and uppercase letter-spaced label.

captured.label: Login flow step 1: Import your Login File
captured.whatItShows: Login path: dashed blue drag-and-drop zone with ghost QR, 'Login with backup' chip, 'Create new account' link, QR-scan icon button.

captured.label: hub.nimiq.com root
captured.whatItShows: Hub root is an RPC-driven app with no standalone UI: renders only the Nimiq header and the animated hexagon loading spinner, then waits for a request (URL self-rewrites with returnURL/command params). Useful as a reference for the hexagon loader.

captured.label: hub.nimiq.com/demos.html
captured.whatItShows: Renders fine (HTTP 200): unstyled developer test harness for Hub API — sections for Stored accounts, Onboarding, Create, Login (Import), Choose Address, Transactions/Checkout, Cashlink, Bitcoin, USDC on Polygon, Sign Message, Multisig, Migrate. Most buttons disabled until accounts exist. Not a branding reference, but documents the full Hub API surface.

failed.target: Main wallet UI (balances, address list, identicon displays)
failed.reason: Requires a created account — wallet.nimiq.com immediately redirects to hub.nimiq.com/onboard when no account exists, and completing account creation requires downloading the Login File (stopped at the download gate per instructions). No identicon-picker step exists in the current keyguard create flow; identicons only appear after account creation, so no identicon element screenshot was capturable.
Not unreachable, but renders no real page — only the hexagon loading spinner while waiting for an RPC request (captured as hub-root-loading-spinner.png).
Page renders, but the Onboarding/Create/Login demo buttons are disabled until Keyguard keys exist in the browser, so no additional flows could be triggered from it.

failed.reason: Demo preview pane is genuinely empty on the deployed site — the BasicModal component never hydrates any visible content (only the Code/Preview tab chrome renders). Verified via DOM inspection; no trigger button exists to open the modal. Full-page screenshot kept; empty element shot deleted.
Same as basic-modal: preview pane renders empty on the live site, nothing to capture or interact with.

Upstream docs rendering gap: only the Blue gradient pill renders in the Gradients table on the live site even after long waits and scrolling; Neutral/Green/Red/Orange/Gold rows are empty. Captured as-is in both the full-page and element shots.
